name: desktop-shortcuts
description: Create operator desktop shortcuts on the Public (all-users) desktop: the local FastAPI control service (http://localhost:8000/), the site weather page (defaults to the Neot Smadar meteoblue forecast, named '<site> Weather (Meteoblue)'; override via -WeatherUrl), SAOImage DS9, and the C:\MAST\logs folder. Account-agnostic so they appear for the autologin 'mast' account.
